subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Truth! In the land of Egypt the candy makers weave their sweet confections in batch after batch, but your sweetness is of a different order [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده حق در اقلیم مصر قناد فوج فوج موج میزند ولی شیرینی شما حلاوتی دیگر
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @consolation and comfort, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
